title: MUSIC VIDEO B — family slow-dance hug during chorus, dogs at feet
prompt: Slow-dancing on a cozy living-room rug. @Mama and @Papa center holding each other, gently SWAYING side-to-side. @Sara holding her free hand at left, @Eva holding his free hand at right. All four softly SWAY in one connected dance. @Joe and @Ginger sit at parents' feet watching contentedly. Twinkling fairy lights all around, golden lamp glow. Slow circular camera move around the group. NO LIP-SYNC required. Static formation, slow continuous gentle sway only. Only soft music — NO voices, NO speech. Suno song will be overlaid in post.
